preconditions: User is not authenticated before launching the application

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for unauthenticated user
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Wait for the SPA Home page to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads in guest state and displays the Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button in visible enabled state without displaying authenticated-only controls or logged-in user information.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button opens Login page from guest Home state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Person/Profile button
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page or Login view opens from the guest Home page and the application remains in unauthenticated state until credentials are entered.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates to customer-search page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Customer signup button
testCases.expectedResult: The SPA navigates away from the guest Home page and displays the customer-search page content without requiring authentication.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates to vehicle-survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Clean survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The SPA navigates away from the guest Home page and displays the vehicle-survey page content without requiring authentication.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates to survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Site survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The SPA navigates away from the guest Home page and displays the survey page content without requiring authentication.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns user to Home page from customer-search page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Customer signup button to open the customer-search page
Click the Back button
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the approved guest-state controls become visible and enabled again.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns user to Home page from vehicle-survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Clean survey button to open the vehicle-survey page
Click the Back button
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the approved guest-state controls become visible and enabled again.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns user to Home page from survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Site survey button to open the survey page
Click the Back button
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the approved guest-state controls become visible and enabled again.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns user to Home page from customer-search page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Customer signup button
Click the Home button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates back to the guest Home page and displays the approved guest-accessible controls in enabled state.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns user to Home page from vehicle-survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Clean survey button
Click the Home button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates back to the guest Home page and displays the approved guest-accessible controls in enabled state.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns user to Home page from survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Site survey button
Click the Home button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates back to the guest Home page and displays the approved guest-accessible controls in enabled state.

testCases.title: Verify Home button behavior when already on Home page in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Home button while already on the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains on the guest Home page and does not duplicate content, reload unexpectedly, or display any application error.

testCases.title: Verify Back button behavior when user is already on initial Home page guest state
steps: Launch the application directly to the Home page in a new guest session
Click the Back button without performing prior page navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles the Back button action gracefully without displaying a crash, broken SPA state, blank screen, or JavaScript error.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled in guest Home state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Locate the Notification button
Click the Notification button once
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled and the application accepts the interaction without UI breakage, navigation failure, or application instability.

testCases.title: Verify guest-accessible feature buttons remain available after returning to Home page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Navigate to the customer-search page using Customer signup button
Return to Home page using the Home button
Observe the Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons
testCases.expectedResult: After returning to Home page, all guest-accessible feature buttons remain visible, enabled, and available for reuse without requiring page reload or authentication.
